name: Orama Search API
what_it_does: Open-source hybrid search engine with REST API and cloud offering — combining full-text search, vector search, and answering capabilities in a JavaScript-native package that runs in-browser, Node.js, serverless, and via cloud API with AI-powered search answers.
use_cases: Adding full-text and vector search to web applications with JavaScript SDK
Implementing AI-powered search answers from documentation via Orama cloud API
Building hybrid search (keyword + semantic) for product catalogs via API
Running in-browser search on static sites without server round-trips
Indexing and searching content with facets, filters, and ranking via API
not_for: Petabyte-scale enterprise search (use Elasticsearch or Solr)
Complex enterprise search with connector ecosystems (use Elastic or Coveo)
Analytics and log search (use Quickwit or OpenSearch for logs)
best_when: A developer-focused product needs hybrid search (full-text + vector) with JavaScript-native integration, in-browser capability, and cloud API for AI-powered search answers.
avoid_when: You need petabyte-scale search, complex enterprise connector ecosystems, or non-JavaScript primary tech stack.

auth.notes: API key from Orama Cloud dashboard. Read key (public, client-safe) and write key (server-only). Index-specific keys. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes beyond read/write separation. Open-source version has no auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: open-source self-hosted, unlimited; Cloud: limited index size
pricing.notes: Open-source (Apache 2.0) for self-hosting. Cloud SaaS for managed hosting. Italian company. Strong JavaScript ecosystem focus. In-browser execution is key differentiator. Orama Answers (AI search) on cloud. Growing developer adoption. Good documentation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for cloud indexing and search. JavaScript SDK for in-browser and Node.js. Read/write key separation. Good documentation. Open-source for testing without account. Orama Answers requires cloud subscription. Vector embeddings handled automatically in cloud version.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Search queries fully idempotent. Document insertion with same ID updates (upsert). Index creation idempotent. Bulk import creates new records for new IDs.
known_agent_gotchas: Public read key can be exposed client-side; write key must be server-only
In-browser version downloads entire index — size limits important
Vector search requires embedding generation (handled by Orama Cloud automatically)
Open-source vs cloud API have different feature sets — Answers is cloud-only

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Italian company — EU-first privacy culture. Read/write key separation for security. Open-source code transparency. EU and US data residency on cloud. Standard SaaS security for search platform.
